MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-03-2005 Dismissal - No Appearance

Mo For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order Re Mandatory Sett Conf
Off Calendar Oct-03-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Off Calendar

Defendant'S Motion To Compel Further Reponses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jul-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patricia M. Fama for defendant and moving party: David Kaplan

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents and to compel attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs Persia Stahl and Daniel Koscielski are ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiffs are ordered to contact counsel for defendants within 15 days of notice of this order to schedule their depositions at a mutually convenient time. Said depositions are to be completed by August 26, 2005. Failure to respond to the interrogatories and request for production and to appear for deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $441.30 are to be paid on or before August 26, 2005.

Any future motions will be heard in Department 612. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
